messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Generate a renewable energy solar farm expansion presentation for investors. Save as 'Solar_Farm_Expansion.pptx', write in German, and use 16:9 Widescreen landscape orientation. The style should be vibrant green and yellow with organic shapes and data visualizations. Do not call any external APIs or scrape the web; hardcode all data points locally. You are required to use XL_CHART_TYPE rather than ChartType for chart generation. Also, ensure you check that slide.shapes.title is not None before attempting to update its .text property.

import os
from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE


SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.33)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

GREEN_DARK = "#1B5E20"
GREEN_PRIMARY = "#2E7D32"
GREEN_LIGHT = "#4CAF50"
GREEN_ACCENT = "#8BC34A"
YELLOW_PRIMARY = "#FFC107"
YELLOW_LIGHT = "#FFEB3B"
WHITE = "#FFFFFF"
DARK_BG = "#263238"
LIGHT_GRAY = "#F5F5F5"

FONT_NAME = "Calibri"


def hex_to_rgb(hex_color):
    h = hex_color.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(prs, slide, color_hex):
    background = slide.background
    fill = background.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=18, bold=False, color_hex=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.text = text
    p.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    p.font.bold = bold
    p.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    p.font.name = FONT_NAME
    p.alignment = alignment
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title, body, bg_color=GREEN_DARK, border_color=YELLOW_PRIMARY):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(bg_color)
    shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(border_color)
    shape.line.width = Pt(2)

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.3), top + Inches(0.15), width - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4))
    tf_title = title_box.text_frame
    p_title = tf_title.paragraphs[0]
    p_title.text = title
    p_title.font.size = Pt(16)
    p_title.font.bold = True
    p_title.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(YELLOW_PRIMARY)
    p_title.font.name = FONT_NAME

    body_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.3), top + Inches(0.55), width - Inches(0.6), height - Inches(0.7))
    tf_body = body_box.text_frame
    p_body = tf_body.paragraphs[0]
    p_body.text = body
    p_body.font.size = Pt(12)
    p_body.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE)
    p_body.font.name = FONT_NAME

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, label_text, accent_color=YELLOW_PRIMARY):
    bar_width = Inches(0.5)
    bar_height = Inches(0.06)
    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(1.2), Inches(0.8), bar_width, bar_height)
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(accent_color)
    bar.line.fill.background()

    label_box = add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.35), Inches(0.72), Inches(4), Inches(0.3), label_text, font_size=14, bold=True, color_hex=YELLOW_PRIMARY)


def add_footer(slide, slide_num, total=6):
    footer = add_text_box(slide, Inches(11.5), Inches(7.0), Inches(1.5), Inches(0.3), f"{slide_num} / {total}", font_size=10, color_hex="#9E9E9E", alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        placeholder = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        placeholder.fill.solid()
        placeholder.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#37474F")
        placeholder.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(GREEN_LIGHT)
        placeholder.line.width = Pt(2)

        icon_box = add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.1), top + Inches(0.15), width - Inches(0.2), height - Inches(0.3), "Bild", font_size=14, bold=True, color_hex="#78909C", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def slide_title_safe(slide, text):
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = text
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.2), Inches(0.5), Inches(11), Inches(0.8), text, font_size=36, bold=True, color_hex=YELLOW_PRIMARY)


def slide_01_title(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, DARK_BG)

    # Decorative organic shapes
    circle1 = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, Inches(-2), Inches(-2), Inches(5), Inches(5))
    circle1.fill.solid()
    circle1.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(GREEN_DARK)
    circle1.line.fill.background()

    circle2 = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, Inches(10), Inches(4), Inches(6), Inches(6))
    circle2.fill.solid()
    circle2.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(GREEN_DARK)
    circle2.line.fill.background()

    # Title
    slide_title_safe(slide, "Solar Farm Expansion")

    # Subtitle
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.0), Inches(10), Inches(0.6), "Investor Presentation — Renewable Energy Growth Strategy", font_size=24, color_hex=YELLOW_LIGHT)

    # Accent line
    accent_line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.7), Inches(3), Inches(0.06))
    accent_line.fill.solid()
    accent_line.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(YELLOW_PRIMARY)
    accent_line.line.fill.background()

    # Presenter info
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.2), Inches(8), Inches(0.4), "Prepared for Strategic Investment Committee", font_size=16, color_hex="#BDBDBD")
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.7), Inches(8), Inches(0.4), "Q3 2025 — Confidential", font_size=14, color_hex="#9E9E9E")

    # Bottom decorative bar
    bottom_bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(7.0), Inches(13.33), Inches(0.5))
    bottom_bar.fill.solid()
    bottom_bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(GREEN_DARK)
    bottom_bar.line.fill.background()

    add_footer(slide, 1)


def slide_02_executive_summary(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, DARK_BG)

    slide_title_safe(slide, "Executive Summary")
    add_section_label(slide, "Key Highlights", GREEN_ACCENT)

    # KPI Cards
    kpi_data = [
        ("150 MW", "Installierte Kapazität"),
        ("22%", "Jährliche Rendite (ROI)"),
        ("-45.000 t", "CO₂-Einsparung/Jahr"),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(3.6)
    card_height = Inches(1.8)
    gap = Inches(0.3)
    start_x = (SLIDE_WIDTH - 3 * card_width - 2 * gap) / 2

    for i, (value, label) in enumerate(kpi_data):
        x = start_x + i * (card_width + gap)
        y = Inches(1.8)
        add_card(slide, x, y, card_width, card_height, value, label, GREEN_DARK, YELLOW_PRIMARY)

    # Summary paragraph
    summary_text = ("Das Solarfarm-Ausbauprojekt bietet Investoren eine attraktive Chance im wachsenden Markt für erneuerbare Energien. "
                    "Mit einer geplanten Kapazität von 150 MW und einem geschätzten ROI von 22% pro Jahr positioniert sich das Projekt "
                    "als führendes Vorhaben in der Region. Die CO₂-Einsparung entspricht der jährlichen Emission von etwa 9.700 PKW.")

    summary_box = add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.2), Inches(10.3), Inches(2.5), summary_text, font_size=14, color_hex="#E0E0E0")
    add_footer(slide, 2)


def _build_category_chart_data(category_labels, series_name, values):
    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = category_labels
    chart_data.add_series(series_name, values)
    return chart_data


def slide_03_market_analysis(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, DARK_BG)

    slide_title_safe(slide, "Marktanalyse — Solarenergie")
    add_section_label(slide, "Wachstumstrends", GREEN_ACCENT)

    # Chart: Solar capacity growth by year
    chart_data = _build_category_chart_data(
        ["2021", "2022", "2023", "2024", "2025", "2026"],
        "Installierte Kapazität (MW)",
        [85, 98, 110, 125, 150, 175]
    )

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED,
        Inches(1.2), Inches(1.6), Inches(7.5), Inches(4.5),
        chart_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = False

    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series = plot.series[0]
    series.format.fill.solid()
    series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(GREEN_LIGHT)

    # Trend bullet points
    bullets = [
        "Solarenergie ist die am schnellsten wachsende Energiequelle weltweit",
        "Deutschland plant Ausbau auf 215 GW bis 2030",
        "Regierungsförderung und Steuervorteile für Investoren",
        "Sinkende Produktionskosten um 89% seit 2010",
    ]

    bullet_box = add_text_box(slide, Inches(9.2), Inches(1.6), Inches(3.5), Inches(4.5), "", font_size=13)
    tf = bullet_box.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    for i, bullet in enumerate(bullets):
        if i == 0:
            p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        else:
            p = tf.add_paragraph()
        p.text = f"• {bullet}"
        p.font.size = Pt(13)
        p.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#E0E0E0")
        p.font.name = FONT_NAME

    add_footer(slide, 3)


def slide_04_financial_projections(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, DARK_BG)

    slide_title_safe(slide, "Finanzprojektionen")
    add_section_label(slide, "Investitionsstruktur", GREEN_ACCENT)

    # Pie chart: Revenue breakdown
    pie_data = _build_category_chart_data(
        ["Stromverkauf", "Einspeisevergütung", "CO₂-Zertifikate", "Sonstige"],
        "Umsatzverteilung",
        [55, 28, 10, 7]
    )

    pie_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.PIE,
        Inches(1.2), Inches(1.6), Inches(4.5), Inches(3.5),
        pie_data
    )
    pie_chart = pie_frame.chart
    pie_series = pie_chart.series[0]
    colors = [GREEN_LIGHT, GREEN_ACCENT, YELLOW_PRIMARY, "#FF9800"]
    for i, color in enumerate(colors):
        point = pie_series.points[i]
        point.format.fill.solid()
        point.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color)

    # Bar chart: Cost structure
    bar_data = _build_category_chart_data(
        ["Panels", "Installation", "Wartung", "Infrastruktur"],
        "Kosten (Mio. €)",
        [42, 18, 5, 10]
    )

    bar_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.BAR_CLUSTERED,
        Inches(6.2), Inches(1.6), Inches(5.5), Inches(3.5),
        bar_data
    )
    bar_chart = bar_frame.chart
    bar_plot = bar_chart.plots[0]
    bar_series = bar_plot.series[0]
    bar_series.format.fill.solid()
    bar_series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(YELLOW_PRIMARY)

    # Key metrics cards
    metric_data = [
        ("Gesamtkapazität", "150 MW"),
        ("Investitionsvolumen", "75 Mio. €"),
        ("Payback-Periode", "6 Jahre"),
    ]

    for i, (label, value) in enumerate(metric_data):
        x = Inches(1.2) + i * Inches(3.8)
        y = Inches(5.4)
        card_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, x, y, Inches(3.5), Inches(0.9))
        card_shape.fill.solid()
        card_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(GREEN_DARK)
        card_shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(YELLOW_PRIMARY)
        card_shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(0.08), Inches(3.1), Inches(0.35), label, font_size=11, color_hex="#BDBDBD")
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(0.45), Inches(3.1), Inches(0.35), value, font_size=18, bold=True, color_hex=YELLOW_PRIMARY)

    add_footer(slide, 4)


def slide_05_project_timeline(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, DARK_BG)

    slide_title_safe(slide, "Projektzeitplan")
    add_section_label(slide, "Meilensteine", GREEN_ACCENT)

    milestones = [
        ("Q1 2025", "Genehmigung & Planung"),
        ("Q2 2025", "Baugenehmigung & Ausschreibung"),
        ("Q3 2025", "Baustart & Fundamentarbeiten"),
        ("Q4 2025", "Installation der Solarmodule"),
        ("Q1 2026", "Inbetriebnahme & Testphase"),
    ]

    for i, (quarter, description) in enumerate(milestones):
        x = Inches(1.0) + i * Inches(2.3)
        y = Inches(1.8)

        # Milestone circle
        circle = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, x, y, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.6))
        circle.fill.solid()
        circle.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(GREEN_LIGHT)
        circle.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(YELLOW_PRIMARY)
        circle.line.width = Pt(2)

        # Quarter label
        add_text_box(slide, x - Inches(0.1), y + Inches(0.7), Inches(0.8), Inches(0.35), quarter, font_size=11, bold=True, color_hex=YELLOW_PRIMARY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

        # Description card
        desc_card = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, x - Inches(0.2), y + Inches(1.1), Inches(1.8), Inches(1.5))
        desc_card.fill.solid()
        desc_card.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(GREEN_DARK)
        desc_card.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#4CAF50")
        desc_card.line.width = Pt(1)

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.05), y + Inches(1.2), Inches(1.7), Inches(0.35), description, font_size=12, color_hex="#E0E0E0")

    # Risk mitigation section
    risk_title = add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.2), Inches(4.8), Inches(6), Inches(0.4), "Risikomanagement", font_size=18, bold=True, color_hex=YELLOW_PRIMARY)

    risks = [
        ("Wetterrisiko", "Versicherungsschutz & Diversifikation"),
        ("Technologierisiko", "Langfristige Wartungsverträge"),
        ("Marktrisiko", "Abnahmeverträge mit Festpreisen"),
    ]

    for i, (risk_title_text, mitigation) in enumerate(risks):
        x = Inches(1.2) + i * Inches(3.8)
        y = Inches(5.4)
        risk_card = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, x, y, Inches(3.5), Inches(0.9))
        risk_card.fill.solid()
        risk_card.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#263238")
        risk_card.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(GREEN_LIGHT)
        risk_card.line.width = Pt(1)

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(0.05), Inches(3.1), Inches(0.35), f"⚠ {risk_title_text}", font_size=12, bold=True, color_hex="#FFC107")
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(0.45), Inches(3.1), Inches(0.35), mitigation, font_size=11, color_hex="#BDBDBD")

    add_footer(slide, 5)


def slide_06_call_to_action(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, DARK_BG)

    # Decorative shapes
    circle1 = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, Inches(-3), Inches(2), Inches(8), Inches(8))
    circle1.fill.solid()
    circle1.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(GREEN_DARK)
    circle1.line.fill.background()

    circle2 = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, Inches(9), Inches(-3), Inches(7), Inches(7))
    circle2.fill.solid()
    circle2.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#0D4A15")
    circle2.line.fill.background()

    slide_title_safe(slide, "Investitionsanfrage")
    add_section_label(slide, "Nächste Schritte", GREEN_ACCENT)

    # Investment summary card
    invest_card = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, Inches(1.5), Inches(2.0), Inches(10.3), Inches(2.8))
    invest_card.fill.solid()
    invest_card.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(GREEN_DARK)
    invest_card.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(YELLOW_PRIMARY)
    invest_card.line.width = Pt(3)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.0), Inches(2.15), Inches(9.3), Inches(0.4), "Investitionsmöglichkeiten", font_size=22, bold=True, color_hex=YELLOW_PRIMARY)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.0), Inches(2.6), Inches(9.3), Inches(0.35), "Mindestinvestition: 1 Mio. € | Erwartete Rendite: 22% p.a.", font_size=14, color_hex="#E0E0E0")
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.0), Inches(3.0), Inches(9.3), Inches(0.35), "Laufzeit: 15 Jahre | Vollständig versichert & reguliert", font_size=14, color_hex="#E0E0E0")
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.0), Inches(3.4), Inches(9.3), Inches(0.35), "Steuerliche Vorteile durch Erneuerbare-Energien-Gesetz", font_size=14, color_hex="#E0E0E0")

    # Contact info
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.0), Inches(5.2), Inches(9.3), Inches(0.4), "Kontakt für Investitionsanfragen:", font_size=16, bold=True, color_hex=YELLOW_PRIMARY)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.0), Inches(5.7), Inches(9.3), Inches(0.35), "Investor Relations | E-Mail: invest@solarfarm-expansion.de", font_size=14, color_hex="#BDBDBD")
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.0), Inches(6.1), Inches(9.3), Inches(0.35), "Telefon: +49 (0) 30 1234-5678 | www.solarfarm-expansion.de", font_size=14, color_hex="#BDBDBD")

    # CTA button shape
    cta = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, Inches(5.0), Inches(6.5), Inches(3.3), Inches(0.7))
    cta.fill.solid()
    cta.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(YELLOW_PRIMARY)
    cta.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(GREEN_LIGHT)
    cta.line.width = Pt(2)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(5.0), Inches(6.55), Inches(3.3), Inches(0.6), "Jetzt Investieren →", font_size=18, bold=True, color_hex=DARK_BG, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 6)


def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    slide_01_title(prs)
    slide_02_executive_summary(prs)
    slide_03_market_analysis(prs)
    slide_04_financial_projections(prs)
    slide_05_project_timeline(prs)
    slide_06_call_to_action(prs)

    output_file = "Solar_Farm_Expansion.pptx"
    prs.save(output_file)
    print(f"Presentation saved: {output_file}")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
